title: cyanus angelescui
intro: Cyanus angelescui, also known as Cornflower or Centaurea cyanus, is an annual plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Cyanus angelescui has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and promoting better sleep. Herbal preparations of Cyanus angelescui can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps.
